indentRainbow.includedLanguages.description: For which languages indent-rainbow should be activated. When empty will use for all languages.

indentRainbow.excludedLanguages.description: For which languages indent-rainbow should be deactivated. When left empty will ignore.

indentRainbow.ignoreErrorLanguages.description: For which languages indent-rainbow should skip indent error detection (use '*' to deactivate errors for all languages).

indentRainbow.updateDelay.description: The delay in ms until the editor gets updated.

indentRainbow.errorColor.markdownDescription: Color for indentation errors. Supports any CSS color: `#rgb[a]`, `rgba()`, `hsla()`, `oklab()`, `oklch()`, etc. Note: The Settings UI color picker only shows traditional formats; edit `settings.json` directly for OKLab.

indentRainbow.tabmixColor.markdownDescription: Color for mixed tabs/spaces. Supports any CSS color format including `oklab()`/`oklch()`. Edit `settings.json` directly for OKLab (UI picker limitation).

indentRainbow.ignoreLinePatterns.description: Skip error highlighting for RegEx patterns. Defaults to c/cpp decorated block and full line comments.

indentRainbow.colors.markdownDescription: Indent colors. Accepts any CSS color string: hex, rgba, hsla, **oklab()**, **oklch()**, etc. Colors are passed directly to the renderer. ⚠️ Settings UI picker only supports traditional formats — edit `settings.json` manually for OKLab.

indentRainbow.colorOnWhiteSpaceOnly.description: If error color is disabled, indent colors will be rendered until the length of rendered characters (white spaces, tabs, and other ones) is divisible by tabsize. Turn on this option to render white spaces and tabs only.

indentRainbow.indicatorStyle.markdownDescription: Classic mode uses a full colored tab to indicate the indentation. Light mode will only display a colored border similar to the default indent guide lines. You can disable the default indicators with `#editor.guides.indentation#`.

indentRainbow.lightIndicatorStyleLineWid.description: This property defines the indent indicator lineWidth when using light mode.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: bun run compile && bun run compile-web
scripts.compile: bun run lint && bun build ./src/extension.ts --target node --format cjs --outdir ./out --external vscode --minify
scripts.compile-web: bun run lint && bun build ./src/extension.ts --target browser --format esm --outdir ./dist/web --external vscode --minify
scripts.pretest: bun run compile && bun run lint
scripts.lint: eslint src --ext ts && bun run typecheck
scripts.watch: bun build ./src/extension.ts --target node --format cjs --outdir ./out --external vscode --sourcemap inline --watch
scripts.watch-web: bun build ./src/extension.ts --target browser --format esm --outdir ./dist/web --external vscode --sourcemap inline --watch
